## tscli create token

Create an OAuth access-token from a client_id / client_secret pair

### Synopsis

POSTs to /api/v2/oauth/token. No API-key auth is required.

```
tscli create token [flags]
```

### Examples

```
  tscli create token \
      --client-id     "$OAUTH_CLIENT_ID" \
      --client-secret "$OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET"
```

### Options

```
      --client-id string       OAuth client ID (required)
      --client-secret string   OAuth client secret (required)
  -h, --help                   help for token
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
